query: SELECT id, email, name, loginMethod, CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'SET' END as hashStatus, createdAt FROM users WHERE loginMethod = 'email' OR loginMethod IS NULL ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
